summary.narrowedSegment: Cross-border Amazon sellers with 10-200 active SKUs.
summary.painfulSituation: Sellers need compliant, conversion-oriented image sets and spend time or money producing them per SKU.
summary.strongestRawLanguage: I spend 30-60 minutes per SKU making a compliant image set, and I still worry the marketplace will reject the main image.
summary.promiseCandidate: Generate a marketplace-ready image pack from one raw product photo, with compliance checks before delivery.
summary.firstReachableChannel: Amazon seller and cross-border ecommerce operator groups.
summary.recommendedNextExperiment: Offer 5 manual SKU image packs to Amazon sellers and measure payment, revision count, and acceptance.
